hook.name: BackGeoOracle
hook.description: A TWAP oracle hook that performs partial backruns after price-impacting swaps: when a swap moves the tick beyond a threshold, the hook executes an inverse swap via poolManager.swap() and credits the surplus to the original sender as ERC6909 tokens. Only exactIn swaps are supported; routers must implement IMsgSender() to identify the recipient for backrun proceeds.
